recent_signals: New CRO hired 2 months ago from Gong
Hiring spike in AE roles (12 open reqs)

interaction_history.summary: Priya replied confirming Monday 10am for discovery call. Mentioned: 'We're getting crushed on forecast accuracy — our CRO wants a 30% error reduction by end of Q2.'
Rep proposed three time slots for discovery call.
Priya asked if we integrate with Salesforce and Gong. Asked about pricing for ~50 AEs.
Priya connected with rep on LinkedIn. Her recent post: 'Forecast accuracy is the #1 thing keeping me up at night.'
Priya submitted demo request form. Filled out: 'Team size: ~50 AEs. Current stack: Salesforce + Gong + Outreach. Biggest challenge: forecast roll-up accuracy across segments.'

meddpicc.metrics: 30% reduction in forecast error by end of Q2 (stated by Priya)
